creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
It turns out that this patch is not commit-ready. The mixed use of OPTIONS causes the USE_QT4 variable to not be set correctly. This leads to a build failure when the XCWCP option is set.

I will not have time in the near future to investigate and submit a fix; I believe this may be trivial for people familiar with the many recent changes to the ports infrastructure.
